Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbandonedShip
    Represents an abandoned ship adventure card in the game.
    AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState
    Represents the state where players can remove crew members from their ship after encountering an abandoned ship during the flight phase.
    AbandonedShipDecidingState
    Represents the state where players decide whether to accept or skip the reward from encountering an abandoned ship during the flight phase.
    AbandonedStation
    Represents an abandoned station adventure card in the game.
    AbandonedStationDecidingState
    Represents the state in which players decide whether to accept or skip the reward from encountering an abandoned station during the flight phase.
    AbandonedStationLandState
    Represents the state in which a player manages the goods obtained from an abandoned station.
    Action
    Represents an action that can be executed by the client.
    ActionConstructor
    Interface for creating actions in the client.
    ActionCreationState
     
    AdventureCardFactory
    AdventureCardFactory Responsible for instantiating specific AdventureCardFilip subclasses based on the "type" field in a JsonObject.
    AdventureCardFilip
     
    AdventureCardLoader
    Loads and builds adventure cards from a unified JSON file.
    AdventureCardOption
     
    Agent
    Represents an agent that can run tasks in a separate thread.
    AlienColor
     
    AlienCounter
    AlienCounter keeps track of alien crew presence on the ship.
    AlienLifeSupport
    Represents an Alien Life Support component.
    BatteryCompartment
    Represents a Battery Compartment component on the ship.
    BuildingState
    State that manages the real-time ship building phase.
    BuildingState
    Represents the state of the game when a player is building.
    Cabin
    Represents a Cabin component on the spaceship.
    CanInsertAliens
    Helper class that tracks which types of aliens a player can still insert.
    Cannon
    Cannon – single or double, fires in specific directions based on orientation.
    CannonShot
    Represents a cannon shot projectile in the game.
    CannonShotPenalty
    Represents a penalty that consists of a series of cannon shots.
    Card
    Enum representing different types of spaceship components (cards) used in Galaxy Trucker.
    CardDeck
    Basically a wrapper of List<AdventureCard>.
    CardLevel
     
    CardLevelMapper
    Utility class for mapping between JSON level strings and CardLevel enum values.
    CardResolverVisitor
    CardResolverVisitor is a visitor class that handles the resolution of various adventure cards in the game.
    CardResolverVisitor.SpaceshipComponentVisitor
     
    CargoHold
    Represents a CargoHold component used to store goods in the ship.
    ChooseActionState
     
    ChoosePlanetCommand
    Command for choosing a planet to land on during planet encounters.
    ChoosePlanetState
    This state allows the first player in turn to choose a planet to land on.
    Client
    The Client class represents the main entry point for the client application.
    ClientMessage
    Represents a message sent by a client containing an action to be executed.
    ClientState
    Represents the state of the client in a networked game.
    CombatZone
    Represents the combat zone in the game, which consists of multiple lines of combat criteria and penalties.
    CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CannonShotsState
    Represents the state in which a player may throw cannon shots during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CheckShipState
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after a cannon shot during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1CrewRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove crew members from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState
    Represents the state in which a player declares engine power during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone1ManageShotState
    Represents the state in which a player manages a cannon shot during the combat zone.
    CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState
    Represents the state in which a player declares their firepower during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2_P_BatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone2CannonShotsState
    Represents the state in which a player may throw the dice to determine where the shot is aimed.
    CombatZone2CheckShipState
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after a cannon shot during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2EngineDeclarationState
    Represents the state in which a player declares engine power during the combat zone phase of the game.
    CombatZone2GoodsRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player must remove goods from their ship during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2ManageShotState
    Represents the state in which a player manages a cannon shot during the combat zone.
    CombatZone2PowerDeclarationState
    Represents the state in which a player declares their firepower during the combat zone.
    CombatZoneLine
    Represents a line in the combat zone adventure card.
    Command
     
    CommandConstructor
     
    ComponentFactory
    Factory for dynamically creating specific SpaceshipComponent instances from a JsonObject.
    ComponentLoader
    Loads spaceship components from a JSON file and returns them as a shuffled array.
    ComponentOrigin
     
    CondensedShip
     
    ConnectAction
    Represents an action to connect to a server with a specified hostname(IP address) and port.
    ConnectedState
    Represents a state in which the client is connected to the network.
    ConnectingState
    Represents the state of the client when it is attempting to connect to a server.
    ConnectionHandler
    Represents a handler for managing the completion of connections.
    ConnectorType
     
    Context
    The Context class represents the current state of the game, including players, resources, and actions.
    Controller
     
    ControllerMessage
    Represents a message sent by a controller containing a command to be executed.
    Coordinates
    Coordinates represents a point in a 2D grid with integer coordinates.
    CreateGameAction
    Represents an action to create a new game with a specified match level.
    CreateGameMessage
    Represents a message sent to create a new game with a specified match level.
    Credits
    Represents a reward in the form of credits in the game.
    Crewmates
     
    CrewPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain amount of crew.
    CrewType
     
    Criteria
     
    DaysPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain number of days.
    DeclaresDoubleCommand
    Command for declaring the use of double components (engines or cannons).
    DeleteComponentCommand
    Command for deleting components from ship during damage resolution.
    Direction
    Direzioni cardinali usate per orientare i componenti sulla nave.
    DirectionSideUtils
     
    Dispatcher
    Represents a dispatcher that can handle message queues.
    DispatcherImpl
    Represents a dispatcher that handles incoming client requests and connects them to the server.
    DoubleCannonsCounter
    DoubleCannonsCounter keeps track of the number of front and other cannons on a ship.
    DoubleType
     
    EmptyMessage
    Represents an empty message that does not perform any action when handled.
    EndCommand
    Command for ending the current player's turn or action.
    Enemy<P,R>
     
    Engine
    Class representing an engine module for the spaceship.
    EnginesCounter
    EnginesCounter keeps track of the number of single and double engines on a ship.
    Epidemic
    Represents an epidemic event card in the game.
    ExceptionAction
    Represents an action that handles exceptions by logging the error message.
    FinishBuildingCommand
    Command for finishing ship building and choosing starting position.
    FixShipState
    State that manages the correction of invalid ships for Level 2 After the building phase, players with ships that violate rules must remove components until they are compliant.
    FlightBoard
    FlightBoard: it holds all the good stuff you need during the building and the flying phase.
    FlightBoardBuilder
    Builder for constructing a FlightBoard for the game.
    FlightPhase
    Represents the Flight Phase of the game, where players take turns to resolve adventure cards and manage their actions during the flight.
    FlightState
    Represents the state of the game when a player is in flight.
    FlipHourGlassCommand
    Command for flipping the hourglass timer during building phase.
    Game
    Represents a game session of Galaxy Trucker.
    GameSelectedState
    Represents a state in which a game has been selected by the user.
    GameSelectionState
    Represents the state of the client when the user is logged in and can select games.
    GetComponentCommand
    Command for getting a component from the component pool during ship building phase.
    GetGoodCommand
    Command for getting a specific good and placing it in a cargo hold.
    GetRewardCommand
    Command for claiming rewards from adventure cards.
    Good
     
    GoodCounter
    GoodCounter keeps track of the number of goods of different types on a ship.
    Goods
    Represents a reward in the form of goods in the game.
    GoodsPenalty
    Represents a penalty that requires the player to pay a certain amount of goods.
    Handler<T>
    Represents a handler for processing messages in a network.
    HourGlassFinishedState
    Transitional state when the building phase timer has expired.
    InvalidCommand
     
    InvalidContextualAction
     
    InvalidMethodParameters
     
    InvalidParameters
     
    ItemType
     
    JoinAction
    Represents an action to join an existing game identified by its game ID.
    JoinGameMessage
    Represents a message sent to join an existing game identified by its game ID.
    JoinSuccessAction
    Represents an action to be executed when a player successfully joins a game.
    LeaveGameMessage
    Represents a message sent by a controller to leave the game.
    LeaveRaceCommand
    Command for voluntarily leaving the race during flight phase.
    LobbyState
    Represents the lobby state in a game where players can see who is connected.
    LoggedInState
    Represents a state in which the client is logged in to the network.
    LoginAction
    Represents an action to log in a user with a specified username.
    LoginCommand
    Command for handling player login to a game session.
    LoginFailedAction
    Represents an action that is executed when a login attempt fails.
    LoginMessage
    Represents a message sent by a client to log in with a specified username.
    LoginState
    Represents the state of a client that is connected to the server and is in the process of logging in.
    LogInState
    Represents the LogInState of the game, where players can log in and manage their connection to the game.
    LoginSuccessAction
    Represents an action to be executed when a user successfully logs in.
    LogoutCommand
    Command for handling player logout from a game session.
    LookDeckCommand
    Command for looking at predictable adventure card decks during building phase.
    ManageMeteorState
    Game state that handles the impact of a meteor on a player's spaceship.
    MatchLevel
     
    MenuState
     
    Message
    Represents a message that can be sent over the network.
    MessageQueue
    Represents a message queue that can be used to enqueue and dequeue messages.
    Meteor
    Represents a meteor projectile in the game.
    MeteorsCheckShipState
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after being hit by meteors during the meteors swarm phase of the game.
    MeteorsState
    Represents the game state where a meteor storm is initiated.
    MeteorSwarm
    Represents a meteor swarm in the game.
    MoveGoodCommand
    Command for moving goods between cargo holds.
    Network
    Represents a network interface for sending and receiving messages.
    OffState
    Represents the OffState of the game, where no actions can be performed.
    OpenSpace
    Represents the open space in the game, which is a type of adventure card.
    OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state where a player must remove batteries from their ship to confirm the use of double engines during the open space phase.
    OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState
    Represents the state in which a player may declare the use of double engines during the open space phase of the game.
    Penalty
    Represents a generic penalty in the game.
    PickNextCardCommand
    Command for picking the next adventure card during flight phase.
    PingMessage
    Represents a ping message that is sent to check the connectivity of the network.
    Pirates
    Represents the pirate card in the game.
    PiratesBatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state where a player removes batteries to power up weapons during the pirates encounter phase.
    PiratesCannonShotsState
    Represents the state where cannon shots from pirates are resolved.
    PiratesCheckShipState
    Represents the state in which a player checks their ship's integrity after being hit by cannon shots during the pirates phase of the game.
    PiratesManageShotState
    Manages the resolution of a cannon shot fired by pirates at a special player during the flight phase.
    PiratesPowerDeclarationState
    Represents the state where a player declares how much cannon power (converted from batteries) they want to use to face the pirates.
    PiratesRewardState
    Handles the reward phase after the pirate attack.
    PlaceAlienState
    State that manages the placement of aliens in cabins.
    PlaceComponentCommand
    Command for placing a component on the ship board during building phase.
    PlaceCrewCommand
    Command for placing crew members (aliens) in ship cabins.
    Planet
    Represents a planet in the game, which can be landed on by players.
    Planets
    Represents a card that contains a list of planets, each with its own landing rewards and a landing penalty.
    PlanetsLandState
    This state allows players to collect goods from the planets they landed on during the ChoosePlanetState.
    Player
     
    PlayingState
    Represents the state of the game when it is currently being played.
    PreBuildShipsLoader
     
    PreBuiltShipCommand
    Command for selecting a pre-built ship during the building phase.
    PrintMessage
    Represents a message that prints a command to the console when handled.
    Projectile
    Represents a generic projectile in the game.
    ProtocolChoiceState
    Represents a state in which the client can choose between different protocols (RMI or TCP).
    QuitMessage
    Represents a message sent to quit the game.
    Receiver
     
    RegularPenalty
    Represents a regular penalty in the game, which can be a penalty for crew loss or losing goods on loss.
    ReserveComponentCommand
    Command for reserving a component during ship building phase.
    Reward
    Represents a generic reward in the game.
    RewardsPhase
    Represents the Rewards Phase of the game, where players receive credits based on their performance and the most beautiful ship is rewarded.
    RewardState
    Represents the state of the game where players can view their rewards.
    RewardType
     
    RMIConnectionHandler
    RMIConnectionHandler is responsible for setting up the RMI connection between the server and clients.
    RMIMessageQueue
    Represents a message queue that can be used to enqueue and dequeue messages.
    RMINetwork
    RMINetwork is a class that implements the Network interface for RMI communication.
    SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState
    Represents the state in which a player may remove batteries from their ship during the combat zone because the player does not have enough goods.
    SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    This state manages the penalty phase for players who failed to match the smugglers' power and also lack sufficient goods to discard.
    Server
     
    ShieldCounter
    ShieldCounter keeps track of the number of shields on each side of a ship.
    ShieldGenerator
    Represents a Shield Generator component in Galaxy Trucker.
    ShipBoard
    Full-featured ShipBoard for Galaxy Trucker.
    Side
     
    SkipRewardCommand
    Command for skipping available rewards.
    Slavers
    Represents a slavers encounter card in the game.
    SlaversBatteryRemovalState
    This state handles the battery removal process for a player attempting to boost their power during the "Slavers" encounter.
    SlaversCrewRemovalState
    This state handles the forced removal of crewmates from players' ships during the "Slavers" encounter, specifically for players who failed to surpass the slavers' power.
    SlaversPowerDeclarationState
    This state handles the declaration of cannon power by players during the "Slavers" encounter.
    SlaversRewardsState
    This state manages the reward phase during the "Slavers" event, allowing players who successfully surpassed the slavers' power to claim their reward (Credits), or to skip it entirely.
    Smugglers
    Represents a smugglers adventure card in the game.
    SmugglersBatteryRemovalState
    This state handles the removal of batteries from a player's ship during the "Smugglers" event.
    SmugglersGoodsRemovalState
    This state manages the forced removal of goods from a player's ship during the "Smugglers" event, if they failed to surpass the smugglers' power threshold.
    SmugglersLandState
    This state handles the phase where a player who successfully surpassed the smugglers' power gets to collect rewards in the form of goods.
    SmugglersPowerDeclarationState
    This state handles the declaration of cannon power by players during the "Smugglers" event.
    SpaceshipComponent
    Abstract class representing a spaceship component.
    SpaceshipComponentVisitor
    Visitor interface for spaceship components.
    Stardust
    Represents a Stardust adventure card in the game.
    StartGameCommand
    Command for creating a new game session.
    State
    Abstract class representing the state of the game.
    StopState
     
    StructuralModule
    Represents a Structural Module component in Galaxy Trucker.
    TCPConnectionHandler
     
    TCPMessageQueue
     
    TCPNetwork
     
    ThrowDicesCommand
    Command for throwing dice during various game events.
    TimeoutThread
    TimeoutThread is responsible for monitoring the network's timeout status.
    Timer
    Represents a timer used in the game building phases.
    Timer.Phase
     
    TUI
    TUI (Text User Interface) class that extends the View class.
    UnconfirmedLoginState
    Represents the state of the client when a user has logged in but has not yet confirmed their login.
    UnconfirmedSelectionState
    Represents the state of a logged-in user who has selected a game but has not yet confirmed their selection.
    UpdateGameAction
    Represents an action to update the game state in the client.
    UpdateListAction
    Represents an action to update the list of game IDs in the client state.
    UpdateListMessage
    Represents a message sent by the server to update the list of game IDs.
    UseItemCommand
    Command for using items like batteries or crew during adventure resolution.
    Utils
    Utility class for networking operations.
    View
    Abstract class representing a View in the application.
    ViewCardDeckState
     
    ViewCardState
     
    ViewComponent
     
    ViewComponentState
     
    ViewFlightBoardState
     
    ViewGamesState
     
    ViewNothingState
     
    ViewPlayersState
     
    ViewRewardsState
     
    ViewShipBoard
     
    ViewShipBoardState
     
    ViewState
     
    ViewTilesState
     
    Visualize
